testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET / returns 200 with HTML UI
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET / returns 200 with HTML UI

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /health returns 200 with status ok
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /health returns 200 with status ok

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /health includes the service name in the response
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /health includes the service name in the response

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /health includes a numeric uptime value
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /health includes a numeric uptime value

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /health uptime is rounded to at most 2 decimal places
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /health uptime is rounded to at most 2 decimal places

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke with filters passes the category filter to the upstream API
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke with filters passes the category filter to the upstream API

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke with filters passes blacklistFlags and type filters to the upstream API
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke with filters passes blacklistFlags and type filters to the upstream API

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke returns 200
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke returns 200

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke returns type: single
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke returns type: single

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke includes the category field
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke includes the category field

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke includes the joke text
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke includes the joke text

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke does NOT include setup or delivery fields
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a single-type joke does NOT include setup or delivery fields

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke returns 200
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke returns 200

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke returns type: twopart
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke returns type: twopart

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke includes the category field
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke includes the category field

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke includes the setup field
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke includes the setup field

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke includes the delivery field
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke includes the delivery field

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke does NOT include the joke field
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a twopart-type joke does NOT include the joke field

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream service is down (network error) returns 502
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream service is down (network error) returns 502

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream service is down (network error) returns an error message citing the upstream service
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream service is down (network error) returns an error message citing the upstream service

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a 500 error returns 502
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a 500 error returns 502

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a 500 error returns the upstream error message
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream returns a 500 error returns the upstream error message

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream request times out returns 502
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke when the upstream request times out returns 502

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API GET /joke response shape always responds with JSON content-type
testcase.name: Joke Generator API GET /joke response shape always responds with JSON content-type

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API 404 handler returns 404 for an unknown GET route
testcase.name: Joke Generator API 404 handler returns 404 for an unknown GET route

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API 404 handler returns a descriptive error message
testcase.name: Joke Generator API 404 handler returns a descriptive error message

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API 404 handler includes the HTTP method in the error message
testcase.name: Joke Generator API 404 handler includes the HTTP method in the error message

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API 404 handler returns 404 for an unknown POST route
testcase.name: Joke Generator API 404 handler returns 404 for an unknown POST route

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API 404 handler returns 404 for an unknown DELETE route
testcase.name: Joke Generator API 404 handler returns 404 for an unknown DELETE route

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API response schema GET /health body has exactly status, service, uptime fields
testcase.name: Joke Generator API response schema GET /health body has exactly status, service, uptime fields

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API response schema single joke body has exactly type, category, joke fields
testcase.name: Joke Generator API response schema single joke body has exactly type, category, joke fields

testcase.classname: Joke Generator API response schema twopart joke body has exactly type, category, setup, delivery fields
testcase.name: Joke Generator API response schema twopart joke body has exactly type, category, setup, delivery fields
